/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIM HEARING /WIT SWORN:SERGEANT BRIDGET O'CONNOR; SERGEANT CARLA HURLEY; OFFICER FRANK CHIAWAH; SERGEANT MATTHEW SULLIVAN; SERGEANT THOMAS MORAN/EXHM:PEO'S 5 - THUMBDRIVE WITN 3 VIDEO VIEWS; PEO'S 6 - PHOTO TIME STAMPEDAT 11:33:24 SHOWING SILVER TRUCK; PEO'S 7 - PHOTO 2 INDIVS NEXT TO SILVER TRUCK; PEO'S 8 - PHOTO INDIV IN BLUE JACKET NEAR BACK OF SILVER TRUCK; PEO'S9 - PHOTO BACK OF MAROON CAR WITH RED PLATE; PEO'S 10 - PHOTO SUSPECT IN BLACK HOODIE; PEO'S 11 - PHOTO SUSPECT IN BLACK HOODIE WITH FIREARM; PEO'S 12- PHOTO SUSPECT FROM THE BACK, POINTING FIREARM AT VICTIM WITH FACE SHOWING; PEO'S 13 - PHOTO RED LICENSE PLATE; PEO'S 14 - PHOTO BLACKAND GREY GLOVES ; PEO'S 15 - PHOTO SINGLE GLOVE IN BAG; PEO'S 16 - PHOTO FIREARM; PEO'S 17 - PHOTO INDIV IN BLACK SHIRT & TATTERED JEANS; PEO'S 18- PHOTO INDIV IN BLACK SHIRT & TATTERED JEANS EXITING NORDSTROM; PEO'S 19- PHOTO PARKING LOT SHOWING PASSANGER EXITING A BACK SEAT OF A CAR ; PEO'S 20 -PHOTO INDIV AT RESTROOM AREA OF NORDSTOM IN BLACKSHIRT & TATTERED JEANSBETTER VIEW OF INDIVIDUALS SHOES & IN PEO'S 17 ; PEO'S 21 - PHOTO INDIVIDUAL INBLACK SHIRT & TATTERED JEANS OUTDSIDE NORDSTOMS DOORS FROM BACK; PEO'S22 -PHOTO INDIV INBLACK SHIRT & TATTERED JEANS FROM SIDE INSIDE NORDSTROMNEARACCESSORIES AREA; PEO'S 23 - PHOTO INDIV IN BLACK SHIRT & TATTERED JEANS FROM SIDE IN NORDSTROM RESTROOM AREA WITH INDIV IN GREY TANK TOP; PEO'S24 - PHOTO NORDSTROM RESTROOM AREA WITH INDIV IN GREY TANK TOP ; PEO'S 25 -PHOTO2 INDIV 1 IN WHITE 1 IN GREY TANKTOP; PEO'S 26 - PHOTO INDIV IN WHITESHIRT;PEO'S 27 - INDIV IN WHITE SHIRT; PEO'S 28 - PHOTO SAMEAS 27 BUT WITH RIGHTFOOT BEHIND HIM IN STEP; PEO'S 29 - EVIDENCE BAG; PEO'S 29A - SHOES; PEO'S30 - PHOTO STILL FROM INSTAGRAM RECKLO223; PEO'S 31 - PHOTO STILL FROM INSTAGRAM/ /X:PEO'S 29 & 29A RETURNED TO SGT, MORAN FOR RE-BOOKING INTO EVIDENCE, ALL REMAINING EXHIBITS WILL BE KEPT WITH THE EXHIBITS CLERK IN ROOM 101FOR SAFEKEEPING/CONT/DOP/
